raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A brown chest of drawers is on a wooden floor. The drawer is a rectangular solid with a front face and a top surface. The drawer is closed. STRATEGY - First, reach for the drawer front to locate the handle. Then grasp the handle to pull the drawer open. Failure modes include mislocating the handle or insufficient force to pull. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the drawer front to find the handle; Step 2 grasp the handle for pulling; Step 3 pull the drawer to open it.**
Goal: open(drawer)
Scene: chest_of_drawers, wooden_floor
Step 1: reach(chest_of_drawers)
  affordance_region: the front face of the chest of drawers
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, chest_of_drawers, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, chest_of_drawers) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(handle_of_chest_of_drawers)
  affordance_region: the handle on the front face of the chest of drawers
  contact: holding(handle_of_chest_of_drawers) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(handle_of_chest_of_drawers)
Step 3: pull(handle_of_chest_of_drawers -> open)
  affordance_region: the open space in front of the chest of drawers
  contact: released(handle_of_chest_of_drawers) [completion]
  spatial: distance(handle_of_chest_of_drawers, chest_of_drawers, >, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(handle_of_chest_of_drawers, chest_of_drawers) > 0.1
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the front face of the chest of drawers
the handle on the front face of the chest of drawers
the open space in front of the chest of drawers
